# Madhu Dadi

> AI consultant and ML engineer with 9+ years of experience building generative AI, LLM applications, RAG systems, and marketing analytics for global teams. Available for freelance, consulting, and full-time roles. Based in Visakhapatnam, India; works worldwide.

## Identity

## Services

- AI & LLM Application Development — RAG pipelines, agents, chatbots, evaluation, guardrails, observability. From $2,500. 3–8 weeks.
- Marketing Analytics & Decision Intelligence — attribution, dashboards, experiment analysis. From $2,000. 2–6 weeks.
- Full-Stack Web Product Development — Next.js, React, TypeScript, FastAPI, Postgres. From $3,000. 4–12 weeks.

## Experience

- Senior Analytics Manager, Novartis (Mar 2023 – Present)
- Marketing Analytics Manager, redBus / MakeMyTrip Group (Jun 2022 – Mar 2023)
- Analytics Manager, GroupM (WPP) (Sep 2020 – May 2022)
- Web Developer & Penetration Tester, Absolinsoft (May 2016 – Jul 2018)

## Stack

Python, FastAPI, OpenAI, LangChain, LangGraph, Next.js, React, TypeScript, SQL, Snowflake, Postgres, GA4, Dataiku, Azure AI, MongoDB, GitHub Actions.
